choices.text: Up to 3 indexed params; logged as topics; filterable. Non-indexed go in data; not filterable. Indexed strings store keccak256 hash. Use indexed for fields you'll filter on (from, to, tokenId).
require(msg.sender == owner) — msg.sender is direct caller. tx.origin is original EOA; phishable via malicious contract chain. Always msg.sender for auth in modern contracts.

questions.explanation: msg.sender for auth; tx.origin is phishable.
